title: Figure 2 in Molecular identification of Trichinella species by multiplex PCR: new insight for Trichinella murrelli
author: Karadjian, Grégory
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 2. Electrophoretic profiles of Trichinella murrelli uniplex PCR amplifications.DNA from T. murrelli (isolate code ISS35) reference larvae was used. Lane L = 50 bp ladder. The genes targeted were the Expansion Segment V (ESV, lane 1), Internal Transcribed Spacer 1 II (ITS1 II, Lane 2), ITS1 III (lane 3), ITS2 IV (lane 4), and ITS2 V (lane 5).
steps_raw: Figure 2. Electrophoretic profiles of Trichinella murrelli uniplex PCR amplifications.DNA from T. murrelli (isolate code ISS35) reference larvae was used. Lane L = 50 bp ladder. The genes targeted were the Expansion Segment V (ESV, lane 1), Internal Transcribed Spacer 1 II (ITS1 II, Lane 2), ITS1 III (lane 3), ITS2 IV (lane 4), and ITS2 V (lane 5).
